commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens Package Acceptance URL tarball downloads, adds a policy-backed `source=trusted-url` mode, updates workflow/docs, and adds resolver regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main's `downloadUrl` only requires HTTPS before fetching, so the missing private-address and redirect checks are clear. I did not run a live current-main network repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Manual maintainer review is needed for proof, compatibility, and trusted-source security-boundary approval; there is no narrow ClawSweeper repair to queue from the current diff.
